# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build-time: ${{ steps.version.outputs.build-time }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Generate version info
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-time=$BUILD_TIME" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "{\"version\":\"$VERSION\",\"buildTime\":\"$BUILD_TIME\",\"commit\":\"$GITHUB_SHA\"}" > dist/version.json

      - name: Create deployment package
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts
          cp -r dist/* artifacts/
          cp package.json artifacts/
          cp package-lock.json artifacts/

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: artifacts/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: |
            scripts/deploy*.sh
            scripts/health-check.sh
          retention-days: 30

  test-artifacts:
    name: Test Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Verify artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Verifying build artifacts..."
          test -f artifacts/version.json || exit 1
          test -f artifacts/package.json || exit 1
          echo "Artifacts verified successfully"
          cat artifacts/version.json

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: |
          echo "Running integration tests on artifacts..."
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          echo "Build Time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-time }}"

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test-artifacts]
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts
          sparse-checkout-cone-mode: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: scripts/

      - name: Make scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/*.sh

      - name: Deploy to staging environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }} to staging..."
          ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          ARTIFACTS_PATH: artifacts/
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}

      - name: Run health check
        run: |
          ./scripts/health-check.sh staging.example.com
        timeout-minutes: 5

      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests on staging environment..."
          echo "Application deployed successfully"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts
          sparse-checkout-cone-mode: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts
          path: scripts/

      - name: Make scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/*.sh

      - name: Create backup
        run: |
          echo "Creating backup of current production deployment..."
          ./scripts/deploy-backup.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production

      - name: Deploy to production environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }} to production..."
          ./scripts/deploy-production.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          ARTIFACTS_PATH: artifacts/
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}

      - name: Run health check
        run: |
          ./scripts/health-check.sh example.com
        timeout-minutes: 5

      - name: Run production smoke tests
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests on production environment..."
          echo "Production deployment successful"

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Successfully deployed version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }} to production"
          echo "Build Time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-time }}"

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment failed, initiating rollback..."
          ./scripts/deploy-rollback.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [deploy-staging, deploy-production]
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup old artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning up temporary resources..."
          echo "Deployment pipeline completed"
